speaker: speaker1
text: Nicole , your Fettucini is very ... unique .

speaker: speaker2
text: But not as good as your mother's , right ?

speaker: speaker1
text: No . It was the only dish she wasn't good at . So we could use you as the new head chef ...

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , Uncle Giovanni . That's wonderful ! Thank you ! Thank you !

speaker: speaker1
text: OK , OK . Get back to work . There's someone waiting for you in the kitchen ...
